Ammon
Detachment Card — Reverse
330 Points

A Ammon detachment consists of 1 Aerospace.

Upgrades

This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 5:

Increase the Detachment size by 1+330 points
Increase the Detachment size by 2+660 points
Increase the Detachment size by 3+990 points
Increase the Detachment size by 4+1320 points

Blackwasp Mk. 30
Detachment Card — Reverse
180 Points

A Blackwasp Mk. 30 detachment consists of 1 Aerospace.

Upgrades

This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 4:

Increase the Detachment size by 1+180 points
Increase the Detachment size by 2+360 points
Increase the Detachment size by 3+540 points

                          A Planetlifter Air Transport 'SuperPelican' aka 'Waddle' detachment consists of 1 Aerospace.

                          Upgrades

                          This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 4:

                          Increase the Detachment size by 1+42 points
                          Increase the Detachment size by 2+84 points
                          Increase the Detachment size by 3+126 points
                          Special Ammunition

                          This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.
